use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for landing pages and marketing sites
Decorative backdrop for card components and content areas
Visual foundation for SaaS dashboards and product pages
Background layer for pricing tables and feature sections
Subtle gradient atmosphere for portfolio and media sites
ai_summary: A decorative background component featuring a subtle grid pattern overlaid with a purple radial gradient. Designed as a foundation layer for content areas, this component creates visual depth using CSS gradients without any interactive elements. Ideal for hero sections, landing pages, and content containers where atmospheric visual interest is needed behind primary content.
